thread.section_title: Queen City News's Home Page | NewsBreak

author: NewsBreak Original
text:
By QCN Digital Staff ,
4 hours ago
CHARLOTTE ( QUEEN CITY NEWS ) — Queen City News is being recognized for excellence in television after receiving a number of Emmy nominations in several categories. QCN received more nominations, which were announced this week, than any other station in Charlotte.
It’s also the second year in a row that Queen City News has been nominated for Overall News Excellence. Here are the stories that have been nominated.
NEWS EXCELLENCE:
This is Queen City News/WJZY, Casey Clark, News Director Queen City News | Charlotte News & Weather | WJZY Charlotte, NC WEEKEND NEWSCAST:
South Carolina Primary Night/WJZY Elections – Queen City News Shaquira Speaks, Reporter Brien Blakely, Anchor Alicia Barnes, Anchor Robin Kanady, Reporter Corey Epps, Photographer Michael Sneff, Producer NEWS SPECIAL:
Sullenberger Air Museum Opening/WJZY The Miracle on the Hudson – The Sullenberger Aviation Museum takes flight in Charlotte Casey Clark, Executive Producer Maycay Beeler, Anchor Jenna Pinto, Photographer Jack Anderson, Photographer Sarah Smith, Editor Stewart Pittman, Photographer Timothy Mullican, Photographer Randy Nielsen, Lighting Director BRIAN CHRISTIANSEN, Photographer BREAKING/SPOT NEWS – SINGLE REPORT
4 Officers Gunned Down/WJZY Shannon Park Shooting – Queen City News Alicia Barnes, Anchor Brien Blakely, Anchor Morgan Frances, Reporter Annie Szatkowski, Anchor Sarah Smith, Editor Janet Parker, Executive Producer Brian Christiansen, Photographer Lauren Davis, Producer BREAKING/SPOT NEWS – MULTIPLE REPORTS
A Tornado in January/WJZY Man died saving fiancé, unborn child from Claremont tornado, family says – Queen City News ‘I was just scared.’ Catawba County neighbors assessing deadly damage from Tuesday’s storm Confirmed EF-1 tornado hits Catawba County, 1 killed and 4 others injured Alicia Barnes, Anchor Brien Blakely, Anchor Maureen Wurtz, Reporter Morgan Frances, Anchor Robin Kanady, Reporter Brian Christiansen, Photographer Lauren Davis, Producer Tara Lane, Chief Meteorologist Ashley Briggs, Producer NEWS FEATURE – LIGHT FEATURE (SINGLE REPORT)
Letters from Thomas/WJZY Family-run Cherryville eatery has long mailing list Maureen Wurtz, Reporter Jack Anderson, Photographer A Guard with Her Own Cross to Bear John Le, Reporter Jack Anderson, Photographer NEWS FEATURE – LIGHT FEATURE (MULTIPLE REPORTS)
Faces of the Carolinas – Lightest Hits/WJZY Signing Santa: Matthews man’s childhood hearing loss gives him unique perspective Charlotte pimento cheese entrepreneur owes business to Jeopardy! winnings Charlotte widow finds solace with friends, cards, laughter Comedy, ASL goes hand in hand with Charlotte comedian John Le, Reporter Jack Anderson, Photographer Jenna Pinto, Photographer Michener Kruse, Photographer NEWS FEATURE – SERIOUS FEATURE (SINGLE REPORT)
The Blue Ridge Runs Red/WJZY Blue Ridge Runs Red: Growing up with the deadliest man in the Southeast – Queen City News Maureen Wurtz, Reporter Jenna Pinto, Photographer NEWS FEATURE – SERIOUS FEATURE (MULTIPLE REPORTS)
Faces of the Carolinas: From Pain to Purpose/WJZY Cancer survivor gives hope to Charlotte patients Stanley man feeds the homeless to make most of his ‘second chance’ Fort Mill breeder hires workers in recovery, giving them a second chance at life Charlotte veterans find healing by fly fishing in western NC mountains John Le, Reporter Jackson Anderson, Photographer Michener Kruse, Photographer Brian Christiansen, Photographer INVESTIGATIVE – SINGLE REPORT
Shredded Justice/WJZY Up to 200 bench warrants intentionally ‘shredded’ in Marlboro County: SC Clerk Jody Barr, Reporter INVESTIGATIVE – MULTIPLE REPORTS
Unheard/WJZY Investigations – Queen City News Jody Barr, Reporter WEATHER
Charlotte’s Great Doppler Radar Gap/WJZY Millions across Carolinas impacted by weather radar gap Maureen Wurtz, Reporter Jenna Pinto, Photographer JOURNALISTIC ENTERPRISE:
Death in Darlington/WJZY MANNER OF DEATH: Reinvestigation of SC phone charger cable ‘suicide’ ends with no charges THE CONFESSION: Mother sues sheriff she claims ‘lied’ throughout son’s death investigation THE CONFESSION: A mother’s pursuit of justice turned a suicide into a murder indictment Jody Barr, Reporter SPORTS PROGRAM:
Charlotte Sports Live/WJZY CSL – Queen City News Christian Audesirk, Executive Producer Carla Gebhart, Sports Director Mike Lacett, Reporter Grace Grill, Reporter Gabe McDonald, Anchor Joey Rogers, Producer SPORTS – ONE-TIME SPECIAL:
Around the Track: Charlotte/WJZY NASCAR – Queen City News Christian Audesirk, Executive Producer Carla Gebhart, Sports Director Gabe McDonald, Talent Mike Lacett, Talent HEALTH/MEDICAL:
Ciara’s Story/WJZY Rock Hill mom who lost arms and legs in rare infection returns home Maureen Wurtz, Reporter Jenna Pinto, Photographer PROMOTION – NEWS – NEWS PROMOTION – TOPICAL (SINGLE SPOT)
Blue Ridge Runs Red/WJZY Sam McGhee, Writer, Editor, Producer Dylan Smith, Producer, Writer Craig Tweed, Graphic Designer William “Joey” Hargett, Videographer Unheard: The Forgotten Report/WJZY Craig Tweed, Graphic Designer Sam McGhee, Writer, Editor Dylan Smith, Producer, Writer PROMOTION – NEWS – NEWS PROMOTION – IMAGE (SINGLE SPOT)
Queen City News – Reign On/WJZY Kellen Dargle, Writer Sarah Kunze, Videographer, Producer Dylan Smith, Producer, Editor Sam McGhee, Videographer William “Joey” Hargett, Videographer, Producer Craig Tweed, Graphic Designer Different, Never Default/WJZY Dylan Smith, Writer, Editor Sam McGhee, Videographer, Producer Sarah Kunze, Videographer, Producer William “Joey” Hargett, Videographer, Producer Craig Tweed, Graphic Designer Kellen Dargle, Writer, Producer PROMOTION – NON-NEWS – IMAGE PROMOTION (SINGLE SPOT)

Faces of the Carolinas/WJZY John Le, Writer CMS crossing guard works with kids to help mend her broken heart Signing Santa: Man makes most of youth hearing loss Charlotte pimento cheese entrepreneur owes business to Jeopardy! winnings Charlotte widow finds solace with friends, cards, laughter Wurtz Words in the Business/WJZY Maureen Wurtz, Writer WRITER – SPOT ANNOUNCEMENT
Word Smith/WJZY Dylan Smith, Writer RISING STAR
WJZY Jack Anderson, Photographer This year’s Emmy ceremony is in Nashville on Saturday, Feb. 15, 2025, at 7 p.m.
